microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation platform** from a 2-person operation into a self-service system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Architected and shipped a 0→1 internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that cut operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model used daily by cross-org teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive **agent-driven resilience testing** capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model across the fleet.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility — including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract** — coordinating eng, ops, and partner stakeholders with zero execution failures.

Built an internal **LLM-powered planning agent** and restructured drill-cycle workflows to reduce planning time by **39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, shipping fast to unblock a team bottleneck before the next quarterly review cycle.
microsoft_2023: Drove adoption of **AI-driven code-generation workflows** across 14 Azure service teams, running hands-on user demos and training sessions that embedded LLM-powered tooling into daily engineering cycles and **saved 37 engineering hours monthly**.

Shaped the product roadmap to prioritize **intent-based YAML generation** by conducting 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, translating customer pain into ranked feature specs that influenced the next sprint cycle directly.

Improved data-pipeline integrity and retrieval speed by enforcing rigorous **metadata standards** and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time by **83%** and reducing noise in downstream automation workflows.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation-prioritization framework spanning 140+ service teams — building consensus quickly and shipping the framework within one quarter.

Ran discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then mobilized a product roadmap to automate critical paths, directly reducing the engineering burden that blocked fast, repeatable deployments at scale.

Engineered a **Power BI data pipeline dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership a live signal to target automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and make two-way-door resourcing decisions with confidence.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** across a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating IT, ops, and engineering to ship on schedule in a high-stakes production environment.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies — sprint planning, backlog grooming, retrospectives — resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and keep the migration pipeline flowing without blocking downstream robotics teams.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release overhead for a fleet of robotics systems operating at warehouse scale.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, deploying a new CRM workflow that cut turnaround time and let the team ship faster without adding headcount.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — rebuilding the website funnel and optimizing the Google Business profile to target high-intent local customers.

Improved leadership **pricing models and margin visibility** by conducting financial profitability analysis across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks that had gone undetected across multiple service lines.
